title: dimensionlib:dimensionlib-handbook-title-basics
text: DimensionLib is shared infrastructure for mods that create and manage custom dimension spaces. It owns low-level dimension registration, coordinate mapping, chunk preparation, visual transfer state, access-policy hooks, and safe return-location plumbing. DimensionLib is intentionally product-neutral. It does not decide what a pocket, portal, waystone, elevator, recipe, or player-facing workflow should mean. Consumer mods such as Pocket Dimensions provide those gameplay concepts and call DimensionLib for the underlying lifecycle and transfer mechanics. What players need to know - If you see DimensionLib in the mod list, it is usually a dependency for another mod. - Use the handbook pages for the consumer mod for actual gameplay instructions. - DimensionLib maintenance commands are admin/root tools, not the normal player UI. What admins need to know - DimensionLib tracks registered dimensions and mappings by stable ids. - Consumer mods own their config and permission model. - Root maintenance commands under /dlib are for inspection and recovery when a consumer mod asks you to use them.
